title: ExecutionPlan
description: Schema for the Mini Execution Agent plan. Supports multiple pricing scenarios without changing executor logic.

executionId.description: Unique ID for this execution. Used for idempotency — re-running same ID is a no-op.

instruction.description: The original natural-language instruction. Stored for audit purposes only.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when this plan was created.

filters.description: All filters are ANDed together. Only rows matching ALL filters are affected.

value.description: Value to compare against. Always a string; cast internally for numeric comparisons.

type.description: Type of action to perform. Extensible for future action types.

adjustmentMode.description: Whether value is a % or a flat amount.

direction.description: Whether to increase or decrease the price.

decimalPlaces.description: Number of decimal places to round to.

summaryRequired.description: If true, a human-readable summary is included in the result.

dryRun.description: If true, simulate execution without writing any changes to CSV.
